What I try to do and what I haven't stressed enough during this call is that I document everything, whether it's a person's record, whether it's my workflow, whether it's I always sit down and I plan, OK, this is the workflow that I have in mind.
Why do I do that?
How do I do that?
Where do I want to go?
And then I test the result of that workflow against my initial hypothesis and say, did I get to that point or not?
For me, planning is everything at the beginning, and it takes more time than actually the workflow building.
I don't want to end up doing something without having thought, OK, what's the goal and what do I want to achieve?
